SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, JASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AT&T (MOBILE SERVICE) LLC (GENERAL COUNSEL) A T & T CORP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
